name: VBA DLL Loaded Via Office Application
notes:
This rule detects VB DLL's loaded by an Office application. Which could indicate the presence of VBA Macros.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Antonlovesdnb
SIGMA Title: VBA DLL Loaded Via Office Application
SIGMA Description: Detects VB DLL's loaded by an office application. Which could indicate the presence of VBA Macros.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(excel|mspub|onenote|onenoteim|outlook|powerpnt|winword)\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(vbe7|vbeui|vbe7intl)\.dll' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY VBA DLL Loaded Via Office Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(excel|mspub|onenote|onenoteim|outlook|powerpnt|winword)\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(vbe7|vbeui|vbe7intl)\.dll' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: VBA DLL Loaded Via Office Application
Event description: Detects VB DLL's loaded by an Office application. Which could indicate the presence of VBA Macros.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
